station.name: Grantham
station.hint: The birthplace of Margaret Thatcher & The Mallard Speed Run of 126MPH a few miles south.

station.name: Doncaster
station.hint: Known for engineering speed that once changed rail history.

station.name: Edinburgh Waverley
station.hint: The principal station serving the Scottish capital.

station.name: Morpeth
station.hint: A small town, home to the sharpest curve on the ECML.

station.name: London King's Cross
station.hint: Famous for Platform 9¾ and the southern terminus of the ECML.

station.name: Peterborough
station.hint: A major junction where routes diverge east to Ely and north to Doncaster.

station.name: York
station.hint: Victorian curves and a gateway to the National Railway Museum.

station.name: Darlington
station.hint: Historic stop near the birthplace of passenger railways in 1825.

station.name: Newcastle
station.hint: Iconic arched roof station on the Tyne, serving the North East.

station.name: Berwick-upon-Tweed
station.hint: Scenic border town station with views over the Royal Border Bridge.
